creative_premise: A room of echoes can be folded into its own address, reopened without a server, and published as a self-contained instrument.
completed_slice: Commit-bound GitHub Pages gate for Afterbell folded rooms
contracts: folded ab1 seed reconstructs exact echo count, marks, and signature
mobile viewport and reduced-motion behavior remain present
served artifact carries the exact workflow commit in deployment.json
source and served HTML reject Mirror Cartographer, research portal, dashboard, payment, checkout, and conversion language
static artifact is uploaded from independent-web only

verification.workflow_trigger: push event created by workflow commit
verification.workflow_run_evidence: not yet available through the connector
verification.public_url: unresolved until GitHub Pages deploy job returns page_url

independence: The Weather Inside a Bell and Afterbell are playable weather-and-echo instruments with no Mirror Cartographer explanation, research surface, worker dashboard, account system, or conversion funnel.

rollback.route: Revert workflow commit e02c9a4975d2b4c10c7fb2ca8e1fbd6322fe4a71 and smoke-test commit 85b7af722cec01654d5414f68458f70d73ecac54.

limits: No browser screenshot was captured in this run.
No Safari Web Audio or clipboard behavior was proven.

The smoke gate proves deterministic source behavior, not audible output or public hosting by itself.
